invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破65000（支撑位）或融资费率Z-score超100%，则趋势跟随失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidation if price breaks below 65000 (support) or funding rate Z-score exceeds 100%, negating the trend scenario.

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破0.091（关键支撑）或融资费率Z-score回升至-30%以上（空头平仓完成），则轧空剧本失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidation if price breaks below 0.091 (key support) or funding rate Z-score rises above -30% (shorts covered), negating the squeeze scenario.

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破80.5（新止损位）或融资费率Z-score回升至-50%以上（空头平仓完成），则轧空剧本失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidation if price breaks below 80.5 (new stop-loss) or funding rate Z-score rises above -50% (shorts covered), negating the squeeze scenario.
